finding.triage_reasoning: Only 2 files were swept. AuditResult is the primary aggregate return type of the audit module, housing issues and a scorecard. If run_audit or any public function returns an AuditResult, external callers reference it. The 2-file sweep is insufficient to establish zero external usage for a module-level result dataclass. Cannot confirm without a broader sweep or inspection of __init__.py and CLI/API consumers.
